posts.author: Kristian93 (Kristian)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

I am trying to set up a License Management system.
My goal is to see what people is assign to a lisence, and who is not.

My current issue is that there is no way to view what people is NOT assigned ta license.

Any ideas?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Kristian! So sorry for the late response here! Did you end up finding a solution for your LMS? If not, send us a message at support@monday.com and we’d be happy to help you get this set up!
